step_by_step_reasoning: The architecture is extracted from the whiteboard image and the transcript. The user accesses a web frontend on ECS, which leverages Amplify to integrate with Cognito and Pinpoint. When requesting image analysis, the request flows from ECS through API Gateway to Lambda. Lambda saves raw data in S3 for future model retraining, queries an Aurora database, and triggers an EC2-hosted GPU-optimized modeling endpoint. The S3 data is also fed to an external development environment for retraining.

graph.name: Tapestry: Serverless and Containerized Machine Learning Platform
graph.notes: Serverless and containerized architecture designed to run, analyze, and constantly retrain fashion-focused machine learning models.

nodes.name: User
nodes.notes: End-user accessing the platform via web browser or mobile interface.

nodes.name: Web Server (ECS)
nodes.notes: Runs a Dockerized web application container.

nodes.name: Amplify Framework
nodes.notes: Used by the development team to quickly deploy and connect frontend features to AWS services.

nodes.name: Cognito
nodes.notes: Manages user authentication integrated with corporate single sign-on.

nodes.name: Pinpoint
nodes.notes: Captures and tracks user interactions and site analytics.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.notes: Separates and modularizes backend APIs for processing.

nodes.name: Lambda
nodes.notes: Executes logic, writes request history, and interacts with databases.

nodes.name: S3 Bucket
nodes.notes: Stores uploaded images for future model retraining.

nodes.name: Aurora DB
nodes.notes: Database for storing transactional application data.

nodes.name: Modeling Endpoint
nodes.notes: GPU-optimized EC2 instance running live ML models inside Docker.

nodes.name: Data Science Dev Env
nodes.notes: External development environment used by data scientists to retrain models.

edges.notes: Pushes site engagement data to Pinpoint.
Sends data science requests to the API layer.
Saves user images and payloads to S3.
Invokes the ML model via its endpoint.
Pulls raw payloads to retrain models.
